source.detail: The kaldo 2.2.1 adapter conformance run from the mapengine adapters wave-1 build (dvnclabs/mapengine, tag adapters-v0.2.0): silicon thermal conductivity from the vendored Si.tersoff potential (sha256 52a93e90596829c57d54eef091de6215f1fac7ca15d57eac7568ddfdda26adfb), with every knob pinned in lineage.conditions (material, lattice_constant_angstrom, supercell_fc, mesh, delta_shift_angstrom, temperature_K, occupation, potential_file, code, code_version, bte_solver); the expected value is the run's own produced kappa, computed fresh, never invented.
